CustomField.description: Set automatically by NPPatch when Accounts are created. Classifies each Account as Household Account, One-to-One, or Individual Bucket based on the Account Model configured in NPPatch Settings. Do not edit manually.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The Account Model type for this Account: Household Account, One-to-One, or Individual Bucket. Determines how Contacts are related to this Account.
CustomField.label: _SYSTEM: AccountType
